text: Replay-CLI for Stripe webhooks during local dev: records prod payloads to SQLite, replays into a localhost server with re-signed signatures.
why: narrow dev pain, Stripe CLI doesn't cover replay-from-prod, $9/mo to focused payments-eng team

text: Grant-budget rewriter for federal R01 NIH applications: parses PI narrative + R01 PHS-398 template, outputs a compliant budget justification DOCX.
why: regulated wedge (NIH PHS-398 versioning), narrow buyer (research admins), $200/grant willingness, template moat

text: MCP server that fuzzes Postgres Row-Level-Security policies: Claude asks 'can role X read rows for tenant Y?' and the server proves or breaks the policy.
why: narrow dev pain, multi-tenant SaaS auditor audience, MCP install is one command

text: Deposition summarizer for plaintiff-side personal-injury law firms: ingests certified transcripts and produces an ABA-style key-fact index keyed to line numbers.
why: narrow buyer (PI firms), regulated workflow, line-number keying is the wedge over generic summarizers

text: CLI that diffs feature-flag states across LaunchDarkly + Statsig + Unleash environments and produces a single audit report for SOC2 reviews.
why: narrow dev+compliance audience, SOC2 wedge, multi-vendor diff is the moat over any single FF tool

text: Vertical SaaS for residential HVAC contractors: auto-fills city building-permit PDFs from job estimates and submits via local-portal scrapers.
why: narrow buyer (HVAC GCs), regulated workflow, per-city permit drift is the staying-current moat

text: MCP server that connects to Datadog APM and answers 'what changed in p99 latency for /checkout this week?' with deploy-correlated explanations.
why: narrow SRE pain, Datadog audience addressable, MCP install zero-friction, deploy-correlation is the wedge

text: Another team-meeting summarizer with AI: Zoom plugin, GPT-4 backend, $12/seat/mo, generic action-item extraction.
why: Otter, Fireflies, Zoom AI Companion, MS Teams Premium all bundle this; commodity, no buyer pain unsolved

text: AI resume builder: paste your job target, get a polished PDF resume tailored to the JD, $19/mo.
why: Teal, Rezi, Kickresume, Zety crowded; ChatGPT free; one-time-use SaaS = brutal churn

text: GPT-powered email assistant Chrome extension that writes replies in your tone of voice, $25/mo for individuals.
why: Superhuman AI, Gmail Smart Reply, Apple Intelligence bundling at $0 marginal; commodity wrapper

text: AI blog post generator for SMB content marketing teams: enter a topic, get a 1500-word SEO-optimized post, $39/mo.
why: Jasper, Copy.ai, ChatGPT direct; Google Helpful Content updates kill auto-generated SEO; no moat

text: No-code app builder powered by AI: describe your app in English, get a deployed React + Postgres CRUD app, $99/mo.
why: Bubble, Retool, Lovable, v0, Replit Agent saturated; no audience wedge; deploy-and-maintain liability

text: AI customer support chatbot for e-commerce sites: drop-in widget that answers product questions, $79/mo.
why: Intercom Fin, Zendesk AI, Gorgias AI bundled; commodity; no acquisition wedge for indie

text: Slack standup bot that asks each team member 3 questions every morning and posts an AI summary to a channel, $5/seat/mo.
why: Geekbot, Standuply, Range crowded; commodity feature; no buyer pain unsolved

text: AI-powered social media scheduler that writes and queues posts across 6 networks for SMBs, $49/mo.
why: Buffer, Hootsuite, Later, Sprout, Publer all have AI; saturated B2C-SMB; no wedge
